name: Growth Automation & AI Ops HR Outbound Prototype

nodes.description: LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, Google Sheets, or manually verified CSV export.
Normalize names, companies, titles, duplicate keys, empty email/linkedin fields.
Infer sector, company size, persona, English need, pain point, and outreach angle.
Score by sector intensity, company size, seniority, and role relevance.
Generate short LinkedIn DM and cold email using lead-level context.
Route leads into Priority outreach, Warm nurture, Test sequence, or Low-touch nurture.
Classify replies as interested, objection, timing, wrong person, unsubscribe, or bounced.
